ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Rs. 5,000 Debit from your ABC Bank Account
ham.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

We are writing to inform you that a transaction of Rs. 5,000 has been **debited** from your account ending 1234 on 15-04-2026 at 10:45 AM.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our 24/7 support line immediately at 1800-123-456 or visit <URL> to review your recent activity.

Thank you for banking with us.

Best Regards,
ABC Bank – Customer Support

spam.subject: Important: Income Tax Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr. Sharma,

This is a formal notice from the Income Tax Department. Your income tax refund of Rs. 1,50,000 is **pending** due to incomplete verification of your documents.

To avoid cancellation of the refund, please **verify** your details by clicking on the link below within the next 24 hours:

<URL>

If you do not act within the stipulated time, the refund amount will be held indefinitely and you may incur penalties. For any queries, call our helpline at 1800-999-123.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Income Tax Department
